recommendations.title: Q
recommendations.overview: A fleeing gangland flunky discovers the New York nest of Aztec deity Quetzalcoatl, the man-eating flying serpent.

recommendations.title: God Told Me To
recommendations.overview: A New York detective investigates a series of murders committed by random citizens who claim that 'God told them to'.

recommendations.title: It's Alive
recommendations.overview: The Davises are expecting a baby, which turns out to be a monster with a nasty habit of killing people whenever scared. And it's easily scared.

recommendations.title: The Ambulance
recommendations.overview: When the woman of his dreams is snatched by a strange ambulance, a young man risks it all to find her and tracks down a trafficking ring.

recommendations.title: A Return to Salem's Lot
recommendations.overview: Anthropologist Joe Weber takes his son on a trip to the New England town of Salem's Lot, unaware of its vampire population. When the inhabitants reveal their secret, they seek Weber to write a bible for them.

recommendations.title: POM Wonderful Presents: The Greatest Movie Ever Sold
recommendations.overview: A documentary about branding, advertising and product placement that is financed and made possible by brands, advertising and product placement.

recommendations.title: Bicentennial Man
recommendations.overview: Richard Martin buys a gift, a new NDR-114 robot. The product is named Andrew by the youngest of the family's children. "Bicentennial Man" follows the life and times of Andrew, a robot purchased as a household appliance programmed to perform menial ta

recommendations.title: Solaris
recommendations.overview: A psychologist is sent to a space station orbiting a planet called Solaris to investigate the death of a doctor and the mental problems of cosmonauts on the station. He soon discovers that the water on the planet is a type of brain which brings out r

recommendations.title: Eraserhead
recommendations.overview: First-time father Henry Spencer tries to survive his industrial environment, his angry girlfriend, and the unbearable screams of his newly born mutant child.

recommendations.title: Fitzcarraldo
recommendations.overview: Fitzcarraldo is a dreamer who plans to build an opera house in Iquitos, in the Peruvian Amazon, so, in order to finance his project, he embarks on an epic adventure to collect rubber, a very profitable product, in a remote and unexplored region of th
